message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  DatabaseBorderColor #000000
  DatabaseBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

actor Admin as A
participant "Employees Module" as EM
database "Search Index" as SI
database "Database" as DB

A -> EM : trigger task
activate EM

EM -> SI : reset index (delete + create)
activate SI
SI --> EM
deactivate SI

EM -> DB : stream all employees
activate DB

loop
  EM -> SI : index employee
  activate SI
  deactivate SI
end

DB --> EM
deactivate DB

EM --> A
deactivate EM
@enduml
